text:
There used to be a beautiful old pear Tree.

It was full of birds.

They liked swinging there.

One day one came down.

You should have seen that girl!

She laughed.

She loved that tree.

A fox came soon.

Oh no.

You'll take me.

They didn.Ot.

They ate each other.


How much do I care?

Probably something.

You know.

I think I do.

You love me.

I love you.

I guess love.

Why not?

You're me.

That's nothing.

You'll kill me.

Well.

I love you that much.

I'll save you.

I think I'll do.

That bird.

I love you.



That's my bird.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
